name: cut
description: Cut settings for zone plot items. Use 2D coordinates in FLAC2D and 3D coordinates in FLAC3D.

keywords.description: Enable a cut plane or cut line for the zone plot item.
keywords.syntax: cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (<x>,<y>,<z>) normal (<nx>,<ny>,<nz>)
examples: plot item create zone active on
plot item modify 1 cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (0,0,0) normal (1,0,0)
plot item modify 1 cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (0,0) normal (1,0)

keywords.description: Disable the cut and show the full zone item.

notes: Create the plot item first, then use 'plot item modify' when the GUI exports cut settings that are not accepted inline.
FLAC2D cut settings should not use z coordinates.
